Global (All).title: China Suspends US Warship Visits toHong Kong Amid Rising Tensions
US Senate passes bill to limit Trump's nuclear authority
Russia says US plans to impose martial law in Ukraine

United States.title: Supreme Court Leaked Draft Shows Plans to Overturn Abortion Rights
United States.summary: A leaked draft of a Supreme Court opinion shows that the court plans to overturn the landmark abortion case Roe v. Wade. The draft opinion was leaked to Politico and has sparked widespread outrage and protest.

United States.title: US Ransomware Attack Forces Healthcare System to Halt Services
United States.summary: A ransomware attack has forced the University of Vermont Health Network to halt all of its services, including emergency care. The attack is a reminder of the growing threat of cyberattacks on critical infrastructure.

United States.title: US House votes to pass bill to boost AI and computing R&D
United States.summary: The US House of Representatives has voted to pass a bill to boost research and development in artificial intelligence and computing. The bill aims to increase funding for AI research and development.

South Korea.title: North Korea Conducts Ballistic Missile Test Amid Tensions With US
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired an intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM) towards its eastern waters, prompting South Korea and the US to launch joint air exercises to demonstrate their military readiness.

South Korea.title: Rise in COVID-19 Cases in South Korea
South Korea.summary: South Korea reported a surge in COVID-19 cases due to the highly transmissible Delta variant, prompting concerns about the potential impact on the country's healthcare system and economy.

South Korea.title: Protests Erupt in South Korea Over Minimum Wage Increase
South Korea.summary: Thousands of South Korean workers took to the streets to protest the government's decision to increase the minimum wage, fearing it will lead to job losses and inflation.

Japan.title: North Korea missile test fuels Japan tensions
Japan.summary: Japan's government on Thursday condemned North Korea's latest missile test, calling it a "serious threat" and urging Pyongyang to refrain from further provocative actions.

Japan.title: Japan's Futenma base relocation delayed amid protests
Japan.summary: The planned relocation of a US military base in Okinawa has been postponed indefinitely, amid ongoing protests from local residents.
